temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) The scene opens on a dark, dilapidated room filled with rubble and debris. In the center, a large, ornate arched doorway is framed by broken wooden beams and shattered pieces of furniture. A bright, warm light emanates from behind the doorway, casting a long shadow and illuminating the dust in the air. The camera slowly pushes in, creating a sense of foreboding. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and ominous setting, hinting at a recent conflict or disaster that has left the location in ruins.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to build, creating a sense of dread.)
(00:04-00:07) A man with pale, blonde hair and a distressed expression peeks out from behind a thick wooden pillar. His eyes are wide with fear and surprise as he scans the dark, ruined room. He holds a thin, dark wand pointed downwards, ready for a confrontation. (Storyline: A character is introduced in a state of fear and hiding, establishing that he is a protagonist who is in danger and trying to escape.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful music continues, punctuated by a sharp, startling sound effect as the man appears.)
